---
title: "Crossing Lake Washington: A 33.01-Mile Run"
description: "Second 50K+ run of 2024 and the longest yet — 33.01 miles, 5:21:26 moving time, looping Lake Washington across multiple trails."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-09-15"
categories: [running, ultra, 50K, long run, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Crossing Lake Washington — a 33.01-mile run. Image: YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/QNRhW_o5SLA)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Running update: my 33.01-mile run today crossing Lake Washington. Moving time 5:21:26, pace 9'44"/mi. This is my second 50+k run, and my longest run too.

Route: Sammamish River Trail -> Burke-Gillman Trail -> SR 520 Trail -> Cross Kirkland Corridor -> East Trail -> Woodinville Trail -> Sammamish River Trail.

Video recap: <https://youtu.be/QNRhW_o5SLA>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_crossing-lake-washington-a-3301-mile-run-activity-7241332891325005825-gbGr).*
